title: Hamnet Wins Best Motion Picture Drama - Hollywood Reporter
text: Director Chloé Zhao's film Hamnet claimed the best motion picture drama award at the 2026 Golden Globes ceremony on Sunday evening. Producer Steven Spielberg praised Zhao during the acceptance speech, stating she was the only filmmaker on the face of this planet capable of bringing the story to screen. Spielberg credited director Sam Mendes with recommending the project, based on Maggie O'Farrell's novel. Zhao referenced comments from star Paul Mescal about artistic vulnerability, emphasizing the importance of allowing oneself to be seen authentically. The film competed against Frankenstein, It Was Just an Accident, The Secret Agent, Sentimental Value, and Sinners for the top drama prize. Actress Jessie Buckley also won in her category during the same ceremony.
